transpilation.note: All circuits transpiled with optimization_level=1 on ibm_fez. See ibm_qubit_layout.json for gate counts and depth.

provenance.physical_qubits_note: Re-transpiled W-state 4q on ibm_fez (2026-03-28). Actual run used same optimization_level=1; physical mapping may differ slightly due to backend calibration drift.

random_basis_selection.note: Each run uses its own seed for independent random operator selection. The same 137 K* operators are used across all runs (deterministic).
random_basis_selection.code: from core import select_random_paulis; ops, labels, _ = select_random_paulis(4, 137, seed=seed)
